message:
test: add proptest suites for LruCache and RingBuffer

LruCache (438 new lines, 200 cases each):
- Structural invariants after arbitrary operation sequences: len ≤
  capacity, head/tail sentinel consistency, MRU/LRU iterator symmetry,
  map-vs-linked-list agreement
- Capacity enforcement: len never exceeds cap, excess entries evicted
- LRU eviction order: after filling, next put evicts least-recently-used
- Get promotes to MRU: accessed key moves to iterator front
- Peek does NOT promote: peeked key stays in LRU position
- Remove + re-insert: removed key absent, re-insert succeeds
- Pop-LRU: returns LRU entry, reduces len by 1
- Clear: resets to empty while preserving capacity
- Resize grow/shrink: preserves entries up to new capacity
- Duplicate put: overwrites value without changing len
- Iterator fidelity: all map keys appear in both iterators

RingBuffer (283 new lines, 300 cases each):
- len ≤ capacity invariant
- len = min(pushes, capacity)
- total_pushed tracks all push calls
- total_evicted = max(0, pushes - capacity)
- Iteration yields last min(pushes, cap) items in push order
- Peek returns last pushed item
- Clear resets len/iteration while preserving capacity/telemetry
- Pop returns items in FIFO order
- Resize grow preserves all items; resize shrink keeps most recent
- Clone produces independent copy with identical state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
